description: Template catalog for the Framer Template Gallery

fields.name: description
fields.description: Short description of the template (2-3 sentences)

fields.name: preview_image
fields.description: Desktop screenshot of the template (1440x900 recommended)

fields.name: mobile_preview_image
fields.description: Mobile screenshot of the template (375x812 recommended)

fields.name: remix_url
fields.description: Framer remix/duplicate URL for the 'Personalize' button

fields.name: color_primary
fields.description: Primary color hex for display on the card

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Comma-separated tags for filtering (e.g., 'dark-theme, animated, minimal')

fields.name: sections_count
fields.description: Number of sections in the template
